title: anisantha madritensis var. ciliata
intro: Anisantha madritensis var. ciliata, also known as ciliate barbed goatgrass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Anisantha madritensis var. ciliata include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
